issues.description: Trigger 'Trigger' is not a valid trigger type. Must be one of: OnPlay, OnAttack, OnAttacked, OnKO, OnBlock, Counter, Activated, StartOfTurn, EndOfTurn
Condition type 'HasCardOnBoard' requires a 'type' property (card type filter), not 'name'. Use CardType condition or specify what type of Supernovas card to check for

Action 'PlaySelf' is not valid. Must be one of: DrawCard, KO, ReturnToHand, PowerBoost, ForceDiscard, AddLife, GiveDon, FlipLife, AttachDon, GiveKeyword, Rest, RemoveLife, SearchDeck, PlayFromHand, RevealFromHand, TrashFromHand, Win
